heading: Regulations or guidelines
label: 10464 Regulations or guidelines
text: Not later than 120 days after , the Attorney General shall publish proposed regulations or guidelines implementing this subchapter. Not later than 180 days after , the Attorney General shall publish final regulations or guidelines implementing this subchapter.September 13, 1994September 13, 1994
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3796hh–3 of Title 42
Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 2106 and is classified to .section 2105 of Pub. L. 90–351section 10465 of this title
